message:
refactor(mcp): enforce framework seam centralization with regression guard

Centralize all MCP framework type access through the mcp_framework
re-export module to prevent integration tests from reaching directly
into fastmcp internals:

- Make mcp_framework module pub (with #[doc(hidden)]) in lib.rs so
  integration tests can import framework types from
  frankenterm_core::mcp_framework
- Add FrameworkTestClient and framework_create_memory_transport_pair
  re-exports to mcp_framework.rs (feature-gated on mcp/mcp-client)
- Migrate mcp_proxy_integration.rs away from inline fastmcp imports
  to use the centralized re-exports instead
- Add framework_seam_guard.rs integration test that enforces the
  single-entry-point invariant as a source-level regression guard
- Track this work as new bead ft-181uk.1 (in_progress, assigned to
  QuietForest) under the parent framework replacement issue

This architectural boundary enforcement ensures that any future
framework swap only requires updating mcp_framework.rs, not hunting
through scattered direct imports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
